description: Temporary VN-input robustness test set. Each case has a CLEAN baseline (ground-truth intent) and a CORRUPTED variant (teencode / no-diacritics / mistyped / capslock / mixed). The corrupted variant should classify + pass the guardrail the SAME as the clean one; divergence = a robustness failure. authenticated=True (Vinnie is auth-only).
